body: [b][color color=#1D80A6]Laincord v2026.0.1[/color][/b]: Welcome to Laincord! This release adds reactions, an emoji picker with search and server emoji support, emoji autocomplete, and a bunch of bug fixes.

[b]Interested in Laincord development?[/b] Laincord is free-and-open-source software which is maintained through community contributions. Please check out [link url=https://github.com/lkenna/Laincord]our GitHub repository[/link] if you'd like to help out. You don't have to be a skilled programmer or anything.
